sr.title: Veće plate
sr.body: Rast zarada je centralni dio ekonomskog programa, uz cilj da građani rezultate reformi osjete direktno u kućnom budžetu.

en.title: Higher wages
en.body: Wage growth is a central part of the economic program, with the goal that citizens feel reform results directly in household budgets.

sr.title: Više investicija
sr.description: Oboreni rekordi u stranim direktnim investicijama.
sr.body: Investicije znače nova radna mjesta, bolju infrastrukturu i stabilniji razvoj svih regiona Crne Gore.

en.title: More investment
en.description: Record levels of foreign direct investment.
en.body: Investment means new jobs, better infrastructure and more stable development across all regions of Montenegro.

sr.title: Jača ekonomija
sr.description: Rast BDP-a i pad javnog duga na najniži nivo u istoriji.
sr.body: Stabilne finansije i rast privrede daju prostor za veća ulaganja u građane, institucije i razvojne projekte.

en.title: Stronger economy
en.description: GDP growth and public debt at its lowest level in history.
en.body: Stable finances and economic growth create room for greater investment in citizens, institutions and development projects.

sr.title: Bolji život
sr.description: Više radnih mjesta i bolje mogućnosti za mlade.
sr.body: Bolji život znači dostupnije usluge, kvalitetnije obrazovanje i perspektivu da mladi svoju budućnost grade u Crnoj Gori.

en.title: Better life
en.description: More jobs and better opportunities for young people.
en.body: A better life means more accessible services, higher-quality education and a perspective for young people to build their future in Montenegro.
